'''jaluhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:febfem|febfem]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-l-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:febfem|febfem]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| jaluhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:jælihith|jælihith]] || [[word:jælihij|jælihij]] || [[word:jælihish|jælihish]] || [[word:jælihi|jælihi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:jaluluhuth|jaluluhuth]] || [[word:jaluluhuj|jaluluhuj]] || [[word:jaluluhush|jaluluhush]] || [[word:jaluluhu|jaluluhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:jaluhuth|jaluhuth]] || [[word:jaluhuj|jaluhuj]] || [[word:jaluhush|jaluhush]] || [[word:jaluhu|jaluhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:jalufhuth|jalufhuth]] || [[word:jalufhuj|jalufhuj]] || [[word:jalufhush|jalufhush]] || [[word:jalufhuf|jalufhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:jaluhuthu|jaluhuthu]] || [[word:jaluhuju|jaluhuju]] || [[word:jaluhushu|jaluhushu]] || [[word:jaluhuku|jaluhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:jaluhuth|jaluhuth]] || [[word:jaluhuj|jaluhuj]] || [[word:jaluhush|jaluhush]] || [[word:jaluhu|jaluhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:jaluhuthul|jaluhuthul]] || [[word:jaluhujul|jaluhujul]] || [[word:jaluhushul|jaluhushul]] || [[word:jaluhukul|jaluhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:jaluhuthuthu|jaluhuthuthu]] || [[word:jaluhujuju|jaluhujuju]] || [[word:jaluhushushu|jaluhushushu]] || [[word:jaluhuku|jaluhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:jaluhuthun|jaluhuthun]] || [[word:jaluhujun|jaluhujun]] || [[word:jaluhushun|jaluhushun]] || [[word:jaluhukun|jaluhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:jaluhuthuoro|jaluhuthuoro]] || [[word:jaluhujuoro|jaluhujuoro]] || [[word:jaluhushuoro|jaluhushuoro]] || [[word:jaluhukuoro|jaluhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
